ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., A, ABBV) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock (e.g., Agilent Technologies Inc.) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the stock belongs to (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to (e.g., IT, Finance) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* IPO date of the stock */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price record belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange (e.g., New York, California) */,
  "mic" TEXT /* Market identifier code of the exchange (e.g., XNYS, XNAS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange" (
  "stock_exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock-exchange relationship */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was listed on the exchange */,
  "delisting_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was delisted from the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the analyst (e.g., research analyst, portfolio manager) */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Firm the analyst works for (e.g., Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being rated */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst giving the rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "price_target" REAL /* Price target given by the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_ratings_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the news article is related to */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "article" TEXT /* Full text of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article (e.g., Reuters, Bloomberg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is related to */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price drop, earnings announcement) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert (e.g., 10% price drop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio-stock relationship */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "return" REAL /* Return of the stock on the given date */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_performance_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator record */,
  "sma_50" REAL /* 50-day simple moving average of the stock */,
  "sma_200" REAL /* 200-day simple moving average of the stock */,
  "rsi" REAL /* Relative strength index of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
